author: ntwari-bruce
name: 9L SwiGLU MLP2 (8xH100)
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 submission: replaced ReLU² MLP activation with SwiGLU (as in Llama/PaLM), with hidden dim scaled to 2/3 to preserve parameter count. Also fixed GQA compatibility for older PyTorch via repeat_interleave. Post-quant val_bpb 1.23697794 under the 16MB artifact cap.
